title: Skyblock++
description:
Welcome to Skyblock++, a Forge modpack meant to enhance the vanilla Skyblock experience!

Sift gravel into ores with Ex Nihilo, make cool machines with Thermal Series, figure out that whole cold fusion thing with Mekanism, and much more!
body:
# Skyblock++
Welcome to Skyblock++, a Forge modpack designed by StikyPiston to enhance the vanilla Skyblock experience!

Sift gravel into ores and befriend the silkworms in Ex Nihilo, make cool machines in Thermal Series, figure out the whole cold fusion thing with Mekanism, and much much more!

This pack should run on most modern hardware with a decent CPU.

Anyways, have fun!
-StikyPiston :D
